metaTitle: RoomXQR - Digital Transformation and Efficiency in Your Hotel
heroSubtitle1: 🚀 Maximize your hotel's potential with the most advanced smart hotel solutions! Leave your competitors behind.
heroSubtitle2: Let your operation run flawlessly while your guests access everything with a single click.
demoFormDesc: Let's plan the digital transformation of your hotel together. Fill out the form and our expert team will reach you for a live presentation.
demoSuccessDesc: Our team of experts will contact you within 24 hours. Thank you very much.
customersSuccessDesc: Hotels using RoomXQR reduce operational costs by 30%, while guest loyalty and additional service sales increase by 40%.
marketingSectionTitle2: Multiply Your Sales and Profitability with QR Menu
marketingSectionSubtitle: Increase your hotel restaurant and cafe usage and maximize your profitability with QR Menu and quick order to room.
kitchenStatDesc: Present your current campaigns to guests instantly and increase in-hotel spending.
splitPaymentDesc: Create an effortless additional revenue channel for your hotel with tourism and transfer ads.
socialGrowthDesc: Instantly transfer the complaints and satisfaction of the guests to the relevant unit. Promote your business with Google reviews and attract organic followers to your social media accounts. You can now receive and evaluate customer feedback much more easily.
multiBranchDesc: Easily track and manage the operation of all your branches from a single center.
marketingMultiLangDesc: The system automatically opens according to your guests' phone language, completely eliminating the language barrier.
aiDesc: Increase your hotel restaurant and cafe usage and maximize your profitability.
mgmtNoTechRequired: No staff training required, reduces reception phone traffic by 50%.
waiterCallDesc: Optimize your service flow with digital concierge; ease your operational burden by transferring guest requests to the relevant unit within seconds.
waiterCallFooter: Reduce reception burden while increasing speed of service.
qrToKitchenTitle: Seamless Communication from QR to the Relevant Unit
qrToKitchenDesc: Requests are transferred directly to the relevant department (Housekeeping, Technical Service, etc.) without occupying the reception desk.
adIncomeDesc: Create additional revenue partnerships with premium ad spaces in menus and information pages.
noChangeSubtitle: Fast Transition with Zero Infrastructure Cost
noChangeDesc: Go digital the same day with your existing layout, without any wiring or technical hardware changes in your hotel. Just place your QR codes and enjoy operational efficiency.
customPricingDesc: Instead of fixed packages, we plan the most cost-effective solution together according to the number of rooms (QR) and needs of your hotel.
pricingContactLead: Contact us now for a special price offer and detailed information.
systemEvolutionDesc: Our system is a living platform that evolves as you use it, where new features are constantly added according to sectoral needs. Features that will make your job easier are added regularly every month with free updates.
branchDiscountNote: Special discounts are applied according to the number of branches and room capacity.
refundNote: 15 days free testing followed by a monthly return guarantee.
roiNote: The system instantly reduces personnel costs and wasted time.
instantSetupDesc: Upload your hotel information, embed QR codes and start operational efficiency today.
referralProgramDesc: Get discounts and benefits for every hotel you recommend RoomXQR.
referralFaqQ: How does the hotel referral program work?
referralFaqA: For every new hotel you add to the system, you will receive special discounts on your annual subscription.
faqDesc: Curiosities about hotel management and RoomXQR.
faq1Q: What kind of service does QR offer to our guests?
faq1A: Your guests are instantly informed about all in-hotel services in their own language, can easily submit their requests and order the food they want from the menu with a single click. They are also informed about hotel events and maximize the use of the facility.
faq2Q: How does the system facilitate operation?
faq2A: Guests see all their requests via QR or send them to the relevant unit without calling the reception desk. This reduces phone traffic by 50%, eliminates language barriers and slowness in service, and maximizes satisfaction. Guests start using hotel facilities more actively.
faq3A: The system automatically adjusts to the phone language of your guests. We can also easily include the additional languages you request as a choice.
faq4Q: Can I leave the annual package at any time?
faq4A: After 14 days of free use, you are entitled to a full refund if you are not satisfied within the first 1 month.
faq5Q: How long does installation and staff training take?
faq5A: Installation is carried out on the same day and you can immediately print your QR codes and start using them. The system is extremely practical; a short 15-minute orientation training for your staff is sufficient.
faq6Q: How does guest feedback and reputation management work?
faq6A: Your guests can instantly communicate their satisfaction or complaints directly to the relevant unit. You can also highlight your business and attract organic followers to your social media accounts by directing them to Google reviews through the system. It is now much easier for you to easily analyze and evaluate feedback from a single center.
faq7Q: Do we update the campaigns ourselves?
faq7A: Yes, you can update campaigns or menus in seconds anytime from your simple dashboard.
faq8Q: Can department speed be measured in reports?
faq8A: Yes, you can see which request was resolved, how long it took and guest satisfaction reports.
footerSlogan: Your solution partner that digitalizes hotel operations, increases efficiency and guest happiness.
